## logCommandError() function

Log a handled command error to the crash log for diagnostics.

Unlike uncaught exceptions, these errors are caught by the plugin server and returned to the CLI host via gRPC. This function writes the full stack trace to the crash log so there's a local diagnostic record, without emitting a "crashed unexpectedly" stderr hint (since the plugin is still running).

No-ops if [installCrashReporter()](./stripe-cli-plugin-bootstrap.installcrashreporter.md) has not been called.

**Signature:**

